name: onedrive
description: Manage OneDrive files and natively inspect or edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint content from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Search, manage, and natively edit OneDrive Office files.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Microsoft OneDrive through Microsoft Graph without relying on the laptop's local sync folder. Alongside safe file, search, sharing, permission, and cleanup workflows, the plugin can structurally inspect and preview-first edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint Open XML content. Excel automatically uses scoped Graph workbook sessions for supported business .xlsx files and a local Open XML engine for personal drives and other supported packages.
defaultPrompt: Run a OneDrive plugin health check.
Inspect and safely edit a Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file in OneDrive.
